top_articles.summary: Fortinet, Ivanti, and SAP have released security updates to address multiple critical security vulnerabilities that could result in arbitrary code execution and information disclosure.   The security

top_articles.title: ‘GreatXML’ Zero-Day Exploit Bypasses BitLocker
top_articles.summary: The PoC exploits Microsoft Defender’s offline scan to spawn a SYSTEM shell when rebooting in Recovery Mode.

top_articles.title: Microsoft Defender RoguePlanet Zero-Day Grants SYSTEM Access on Updated Windows
top_articles.summary: The anonymous security researcher going by the name Chaotic Eclipse (aka Nightmare-Eclipse) has released  a proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit for yet another Microsoft Defender zero-day named RoguePlanet

top_articles.title: Critical HVAC and UPS Vulnerabilities Could Let Hackers Disrupt Data Centers
top_articles.summary: Claroty researchers have analyzed the security of Vertiv UPS network cards and the Trane Tracer SC+ HVAC controller.

top_articles.title: New Windows Zero-Day Exploit ‘RoguePlanet’ Released
top_articles.summary: Exploiting a race condition in Microsoft Defender, the exploit leads to local privilege escalation to SYSTEM.

top_articles.title: Critical Vulnerabilities Patched in Fortinet, Ivanti Products
top_articles.summary: Two OS command injection flaws can be exploited remotely, without authentication, for arbitrary code execution.

top_articles.title: Microsoft patches YellowKey, GreenPlasma, MiniPlasma zero-days
top_articles.summary: On Tuesday, Microsoft patched two zero-day vulnerabilities that let attackers gain SYSTEM privileges on fully patched Windows systems, and a third one that grants access to BitLocker-protected drives.
